exam_name: CPA Common Final Examination (CFE) — Day 2 Multi-Competency
exam_format: 3-day written examination at CPA exam centres (paper-based or CBE)
exam_price_notes: Included in the 3-day CFE package fee. Pass/fail with competency-level assessment.

testing_centers.notes: CFE is administered at designated CPA exam centres across Canada. Not delivered via Pearson VUE or Prometric. Paper-based or computer-based depending on sitting year and jurisdiction.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required at CPA exam centre. Name must match CPA Canada / provincial body registration exactly.
exam_rules: CFE is a 3-day written examination (paper-based or CBE at CPA exam centres). Not externally proctored — administered exclusively at official CPA exam centres. Passing is assessed as pass/fail with sub-competency level ratings. CPA PEP prerequisite modules (Core 1, Core 2, two elective modules) must be completed before CFE. 30 months of CPA-approved practical experience required alongside or after PEP for full designation.
renewal_options: CPA designation does not expire but requires annual membership in good standing with the provincial CPA body. Continuing Professional Development (CPD) requirements apply annually.

prerequisites.description: CPA PEP prerequisite modules required; CFE Day 1 is taken on the preceding day

retake_policy.notes: CFE may be attempted up to 6 times total. Candidates who do not pass may be eligible to write only the failing day(s) on subsequent attempts. Retake registration fees apply.

official_study_resources.title: CPA Canada Competency Map
official_study_resources.notes: Free official competency map defining all knowledge and skill areas assessed on the CFE

official_study_resources.title: CPA Canada CFE Past Exams and Debrief
official_study_resources.notes: Past CFE papers and official debrief documents available free to registered candidates

aliases: cpa common final examination cfe day 2 multi-competency
